problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
